title: Allow us (developers) setting a "Column Id" for each column (over your Ids)

posts.author: eitanal (Eitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
As a one that uses your boards using API webhooks, I find it difficult not having a way setting column Id by myself (can be as a second level over your ID) + the ability to search using graphQL query by it.
Is there any chance you can push this to your developments?
Thanks!
